section_2_particulars_of_purchaser_ltd_c.nature_of_business: Wholesale and distribution of commercial and residential electrical components, including switchgear, lighting, cabling, safety equipment, and related installation accessories, servicing electrical contractors and facilities managers across New South Wales.
section_2_particulars_of_purchaser_ltd_c.special_instructions_ie_working_hours_et: Deliveries are accepted Monday to Friday between 7:30 AM and 3:30 PM only. Please book deliveries requiring a forklift at least 24 hours in advance via email to warehouse@harbourviewelectrical.com.au with the purchase order number clearly referenced. For smaller parcels (courier deliveries), reception is open until 5:00 PM. Please avoid deliveries between 12:30 PM and 1:00 PM due to lunch breaks and limited staff availability. For accounts queries, the preferred contact method is email (accounts@harbourviewelectrical.com.au); phone enquiries are best made between 10:00 AM and 2:00 PM AEST. If deliveries are coming on pallets, please ensure pallets are CHEP or plain timber only—no plastic pallets, as our racking is not compatible. All delivery dockets must clearly state our purchase order number, the item codes, and quantities, as our warehouse staff reconcile every delivery line-by-line against the PO before signing. If there are any backorders or substituted items, please highlight them on the paperwork to avoid delays in processing. Our warehouse entrance is via the rear roller door on Wharf Lane; GPS sometimes routes drivers to the front office entrance on Harbourview Road, which cannot accept pallets or large trucks.

All branches may place orders under the same account; invoices should clearly identify the branch name and delivery address for reconciliation purposes.

section_3_particulars_of_purchaser_sole_.occupation: Finance & Operations Manager (acting as authorised representative of Harbourview Electrical Supplies Pty Ltd)
section_3_particulars_of_purchaser_sole_.individuals_relationship_to_abn: I am an employee and authorised representative of Harbourview Electrical Supplies Pty Ltd (ABN 41 726 593 218). I do not operate as a sole trader for this account, nor do I hold a personal ABN in relation to these transactions. My role is Finance & Operations Manager, and I have delegated authority from the company directors to complete credit applications, negotiate payment terms, and approve supplier onboarding documentation on behalf of the company. All purchases made under this account are for business purposes only and are to be billed directly to Harbourview Electrical Supplies Pty Ltd at the head office address. I am responsible for overseeing our accounts payable function, ensuring invoices are matched to purchase orders and delivery dockets, and that payments are processed in line with agreed trading terms. I also coordinate with our warehouse managers at each branch to resolve any delivery discrepancies, short shipments, or warranty issues that may arise. While my personal contact details are provided to facilitate communication and timely resolution of account matters, I confirm that I am not personally liable for the account; liability rests solely with Harbourview Electrical Supplies Pty Ltd as the contracting entity.
